name: Sourdough Biscuit Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the warm water, yeast, sugar, and salt.
2. When the yeast is dissolved, add the oil.
3. Combine the baking soda with the buttermilk and add to the yeast mixture.
4. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
5. Combine the dry ingredients with the liquid ingredients.
6. Place the dough in an airtight (covered) container and refrigerate until ready to use. The longer it is kept, the better it will be.
7. When ready to use, preheat the oven to 350° F.
8. Scoop the amount of dough that you can lift with two teaspoons into each cup of greased muffin tins.
9. Let rise until doubled in bulk.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until brown.
